title: calochortus montanus
intro: Calochortus montanus, also known as the Sierra mariposa lily or mountain mariposa lily, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the lily family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Calochortus montanus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
